name: Key Exchange without Entity Authentication
description: The product performs a cryptographic key exchange with a remote actor without verifying that actor's identity. This enables man-in-the-middle attacks where an attacker can impersonate a legitimate endpoint and intercept or modify encrypted communications.
detection_pattern: Look for EXTERNAL nodes (remote peer, network endpoint) participating in TRANSFORM nodes (key exchange, Diffie-Hellman, key agreement) without an AUTH mediator (certificate validation, entity authentication, identity verification) that confirms the identity of the remote party before or during the key exchange.
